title: chrysanthemum × sinense
intro: Chrysanthemum × sinense, also known as the Shandong chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Shandong province in eastern China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum × sinense include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum × sinense include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
